summary: Bug fix verification testing complete. All 3 reported critical bugs have been FIXED: 1) Level Up wizard shows HP roll UI correctly (was showing blank screen), 2) Edit Character button navigates to edit page with data loaded (was showing blank), 3) HP clamping fix in frontend ensures HP never displays above max_hp. 16 tests passed (10 backend + 6 frontend).

BUG-1.title: Level Up flow blank screen after HP roll
BUG-1.fix_description: Fixed double /api prefix in API URL - changed from ${API}/api/characters to ${API}/characters
BUG-1.verification: Level Up wizard now shows HP roll UI correctly, proceeds through all steps to confirmation

BUG-2.title: Edit Character button leads to blank screen
BUG-2.fix_description: Added missing route for /characters/:characterId/edit pointing to CharacterBuilder with editMode=true
BUG-2.verification: Edit button navigates to /characters/{id}/edit, CharacterBuilder loads with character data pre-filled

BUG-3.title: HP can display higher than max
BUG-3.fix_description: fetchCharacter now clamps HP to maxHp: setCurrentHp(Math.min(charHp, charMaxHp))
BUG-3.verification: Frontend clamps HP display to never exceed max_hp value

seed_data_creation: Used existing test character: TEST_Hero_1773389545537 (Fighter, ID: 0bda5cf5-b8be-40c8-b2bc-b030ea70c366)
